objective: Run compact exact-projection baselines on a topology-balanced split of the Wave 55 rpf36 exact shard.
non_negotiables: The topology-balanced split is an ablation split, not a replacement for prior hash-split audit artifacts.
Each topology family must contribute 24 train, 6 dev, and 6 test rows on the rpf36 shard.
Any topology test lift must be compared against dev behavior and deterministic controls before claims.
Full result signatures remain excluded from learned-model claims unless unseen-label support is solved.

tasks.prompt: Add and run a topology-balanced exact-projection baseline report over the Wave 55 rpf36 exact shard.
acceptance: Each topology family contributes 24 train, 6 dev, and 6 test examples.
The topology target has zero dev/test unseen labels.
The report records deterministic and learned probe controls.

tasks.prompt: Record Wave 57 as a stronger ablation split with tentative, non-claim baseline evidence.
commands: python3 -m py_compile engine/ml_model.py engine/test.py agents/network.py agents/label_schema.py
acceptance: Docs state that the best topology test score is 0.3889 but dev remains below majority.
Docs route next work to source diversity or model/feature ablations that improve both dev and test.

integration_gates.command: python3 agents/network.py validate && python3 agents/network.py validate-wave agents/waves/wave_57_topology_balanced_projection_baselines.json
integration_gates.success_signal: The Wave 57 plan is internally consistent.
The topology-balanced baseline report is reproducible.
